docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTAPP, INC., A CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
